agents.name: main
agents.description: General-purpose agent session. Used for ad-hoc reasoning and anomaly handling.

agents.name: board-meeting
agents.description: Daily planning session. Receives full financial context and produces a strategic assessment plus a prioritised action list. Expected to call tools during the session.

agents.name: decision
agents.description: Short-lived event-triggered session for a single focused decision (anomaly handling, experiment evaluation, pricing review). Receives a pre-assembled context object and must produce a structured JSON response.
